databaseTree.tables: SELECT TABLE_NAME AS TableName FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE' LIMIT $limit OFFSET $offset;
databaseTree.views: SELECT TABLE_NAME AS ViewName FROM information_schema.views WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() LIMIT $limit OFFSET $offset;

databaseObject.view: SELECT VIEW_DEFINITION AS ViewDefinition FROM information_schema.views WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = $viewName;
